purpose: Create a Trial Balance report. Lands in Unfiled Reports. Filing into a binder folder (Move + Set-Index) is a separate step.

body_template.engagementId: <clientId — misnamed field per platform-wide naming gotcha>

reportFormat.columns: [] for CCH defaults, or list of column objects — see column_object_shape below

enums.TrialBalance: name of the engagement's TB; default 'Financial' works for non-consolidated engagements
enums.column_types: see references/config/tb_column_types.json — Unadjusted, Adjusted, Aje, Final, Remarks confirmed; Reclassified/Tax/PAJE/variance variants likely exist but not yet captured

column_object_shape.type: string — Unadjusted | Adjusted | Aje | Final | Remarks | ...
column_object_shape.name: string — display name, e.g. 'Unadjusted Balance', 'Adjusted Journal Entry', 'Final Balance', 'Remarks 1'
column_object_shape.variance: null in all captured columns; presumed to populate for variance-type columns
column_object_shape.periodId: int — engagement period id (e.g. current-year id, prior-year id)
column_object_shape.isDeleted: bool — false for active columns; removed columns appear to be filtered out client-side before POST, not sent as isDeleted=true
column_object_shape.engagementId: int — ONLY present on columns where type='Remarks' (other types omit this field)

gotchas: Body field `engagementId` carries the clientId value (not the engagementId). Same naming gotcha as WPM. Always read by value, not field name.
All-groups mode: includeSelectedGroups=false + IncludeCurrentandFutureGroups=true + FinancialGroupsIncluded=[] (EMPTY ARRAY, NOT null).
Selected-groups mode: invert all three — includeSelectedGroups=true + IncludeCurrentandFutureGroups=false + FinancialGroupsIncluded=[ids].
report_index populates the workpaper's index attribute, but does NOT auto-file into a binder folder. Move + Set-Index after via scripts.wpm.
IncludeSumOfAccountGroups: when unchecked it serializes as null (not false); when checked it serializes as true. Other ReportSettings booleans serialize as false/true normally.

reportFormat.columns: send [] to let CCH use engagement defaults; supply a list of column dicts to override. Column types with type='Remarks' must include an `engagementId` field; other types must NOT include that field.
Removing a column from the UI selection does NOT appear in the body as isDeleted=true — the column is simply omitted from the columns array.
verification: GET /v1/trialbalancereport/tbreports/{clientId} — new reportGuid + reportName should appear in the response array.
